{{DISPLAYTITLE:Upthrust Esports Pro Showdown 2026}} {{Upthrust Esports Navbox}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Upthrust Esports Pro Showdown 2026 |tickername=Pro Showdown 2026 |shortname=2026 |image= |icon=Upthrust Esports allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=UE Pro Showdown |organizer=Upthrust Esports |organizer-link=https://www.upthrustesports.com/ |sponsor= |mode=squads |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=3,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2026-01-10 |edate=2026-01-12 |web= |facebook=upthrust.esports |discord=syhNkeA9Sp |youtube=c/UPTHRUSTESPORTS |instagram=upthrust_esports |previous=Upthrust_Esports/Pro_Showdown/Season_2{{!}}Season 2 }} ==About== ===Format=== * '''Quarter Finals:''''' January 4th - 5th, 2026 ** 32 teams, 2 matchdays. *** Each group will play 6 matches. ** Teams are divided equally into 2 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams from each group (Total 16 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Bottom 8 teams from each group (Total 16 teams)}} advance to Lower Brackets.
* '''Lower Brackets:''''' January 6th, 2026 ** 16 teams, 1 matchday. ** Each team will play 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advances to the Semi Finals. **{{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' January 7th - 8th, 2026 ** 24 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 8 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the Overall Standings advance to the Grand Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' January 10th - 12th, 2026 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). {{box|start|padding=1em}} ====Points Distribution==== {{Points10|toggle=false}} {{box|break}} ====Map Rotation==== {{MapRotation|REMEME|margin-top=0}} {{box|end}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=120000|{{Opponent|GodLike Esports}} }}
